backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining BlogPost and Comment types with CRUD operations for blog posts, comment management, and blob storage integration via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: updating CSS color palette to blue/green in index.css and applying the color scheme across components in tailwind.config.js.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing structure, component hierarchy, pages for categories/remedies/blog/admin, and the blue/green color scheme implementation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, using grayscale values (no blue/green custom colors defined here).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, about, categories, 15 remedy pages, blog, admin, legal) and QueryClient setup.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for blog pages featuring remedy search with SearchBar/SearchResults, popular posts list, and category counts.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays and manages comments for a blog post, including a form to add new comments with author name and content, and renders existing comments with timestamps and user avatars.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Renders a large featured blog post card with image, title, excerpt, category badge, publish date, and read time, with hover effects and a link to the full post.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with four columns: about section with logo, quick links, category links, and newsletter signup with social media icons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main layout wrapper component that includes Navigation header, main content area, and Footer for all pages.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Implements a sticky navigation bar with logo, main nav links, categories dropdown menu, admin link, and responsive mobile menu with hamburger toggle.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a blog post card with image, category badge, title, excerpt, publish date, and read time in a hover-responsive card layout.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Provides a search input field with search icon, clear button, and keyboard navigation support (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) for remedy searches.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays search results in a dropdown overlay with keyboard navigation support, showing remedy titles, categories, and handling result selection and navigation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all/published posts, create, update, delete) and comment management, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook providing search functionality for Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords across health remedies, skin care, and hair care categories.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom blue/green color palette for light and dark modes, defining CSS variables for theme colors and utility classes for ocean-blue, sky-blue, forest-green, mint-green, and teal colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication, rendering the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings with a hero section and content cards describing their Ayurvedic wellness platform approach.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, delete confirmation dialog, and navigation to create/edit pages. Uses React Query hooks for fetching and deleting posts with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid layout with sidebar. Fetches published posts using React Query and shows loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page that displays full post content with featured image, metadata, and comment section. Finds post by slug from published posts list.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with rich text editor (ReactQuill), image upload with preview, and fields for title, category, excerpt, tags, and publish status. Handles image conversion to ExternalBlob with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing blog posts, similar to CreateBlogPostPage but pre-populates fields from fetched post data. Handles both new image uploads and preserving existing images.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: React page component displaying dandruff and scalp care remedies with hero section, back navigation, and cards showing 4 natural treatments (neem-tea tree, lemon-yogurt, fenugreek-curd, aloe vera-coconut) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: React page component for grey hair solutions featuring 4 Ayurvedic remedies (curry leaves-coconut oil, amla-henna, black tea-coffee rinse, bhringraj-brahmi) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency for preventing and reversing premature greying.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: React page component presenting 4 hair fall treatment remedies (onion juice, fenugreek seeds, amla-shikakai, curry leaves-coconut oil) with structured cards containing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency for reducing hair loss.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component showcasing 4 hair growth remedies (castor-coconut oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj, egg-yogurt protein, hibiscus-curry leaves) with detailed application instructions, benefits, and frequency recommendations to stimulate healthy hair growth.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component displaying 5 hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil treatment, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi oil) with comprehensive ingredients, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency for deep conditioning and nourishment.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for hair care category displaying subcategories (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils/masks) as clickable cards with icons and descriptions. Features hero section with category introduction.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedy with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

Alternative React component for diabetes and blood pressure support using Card UI components, featuring fenugreek seeds water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon tea, and garlic-ginger remedy with preparation instructions, benefits, and usage guidelines.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page component for digestive and gut health remedies including Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, displaying ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage recommendations in Card components.

React component presenting digestive health remedies with Triphala powder, ginger-lemon tonic, CCF tea, and ajwain water, featuring icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency information for improving digestive fire (Agni).
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: React page component displaying immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, and Chyawanprash with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

React component showcasing immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea, Chyawanprash tonic, and amla-honey shot with detailed ingredients, application methods, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: React page component presenting stress relief and sleep remedies like Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, and Almond-Saffron Milk with detailed application instructions and benefits.

Alternative React page for stress and sleep solutions featuring similar remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Infusion, Almond Milk with Saffron) with a different layout using Card components and back navigation.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: React page component showcasing weight management remedies including Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, and Cabbage-Carrot Detox Juice with metabolism-boosting benefits and application steps.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes/BP, Stress/Sleep) in a grid with icons and descriptions. Includes hero section with page title and decorative elements.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage component with hero banner, featured post display, recent posts grid, and category exploration section. Fetches published posts using useGetPublishedPosts hook and handles loading/empty states.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page displaying information collection practices, data usage, and user rights in card-based layout. Includes hero section with back navigation and dynamically displays current date.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: React page component for acne and pimple treatments featuring Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with detailed application methods and skin benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: React page component displaying four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (neem-turmeric, tea tree-aloe, sandalwood-rosewater, cinnamon-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency information.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: React page component showcasing four anti-aging remedies (almond-saffron serum, avocado-honey mask, rose water-glycerin tonic, papaya-yogurt mask) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, and benefits for youthful skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: React page component presenting five DIY face pack recipes (multani mitti, besan-turmeric, oatmeal-honey, sandalwood-rose, banana-honey) categorized by skin type with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: React page component featuring four natural glow remedies (turmeric-yogurt mask, saffron-milk treatment, aloe vera-rose water toner, papaya-honey mask) with ingredients, application methods, and benefits for radiant skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: React page component displaying four remedies for pigmentation and dark spots (lemon-honey mask, potato-cucumber juice, almond-milk cream, orange peel-yogurt pack) with detailed application instructions and benefits, includes navigation back to skin care section.

React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for pigmentation reduction with four natural treatments (lemon-honey, potato-cucumber, saffron-milk, orange peel-yogurt), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for Skin Care category displaying five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) in a grid layout. Similar structure to HealthRemediesPage with hero section and clickable category cards.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of service page with medical disclaimer alert and multiple card sections covering agreement terms, website use, and legal provisions. Includes hero section with back navigation and formatted date display.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including HSL-based color system, custom spacing, typography plugins, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking the AyurGlow Secrets website with blue and green color scheme implementation, documenting completed CSS palette updates and pending feature requests.
